title: Hindalco Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hindalco Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries:
Hindalco Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries!
